name: houdini
description: SideFX Houdini automation — nodes, rendering, geometry, PDG/TOPs, USD/Solaris, HDAs, VEX, DOPs, viewport, COPs, CHOPs via 166 MCP tools.

prerequisites.name: uv
prerequisites.note: Needed to run the houdini-mcp server

prerequisites.name: npx
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (npx is bundled with npm)
prerequisites.note: Needed for MCPorter to call houdini-mcp tools from the CLI

methods.name: bootstrap-unix
methods.command: git clone -b patched https://github.com/arghhhhh/houdini-mcp.git '{{HOUDINI_MCP_DIR}}' && cd '{{HOUDINI_MCP_DIR}}' && bash bootstrap.sh

methods.name: bootstrap-windows
methods.command: git clone -b patched https://github.com/arghhhhh/houdini-mcp.git '{{HOUDINI_MCP_DIR}}' && cd '{{HOUDINI_MCP_DIR}}' && cmd.exe /c bootstrap.bat

methods.name: manual
methods.note: Clone arghhhhh/houdini-mcp (branch: patched) to the path you set in HOUDINI_MCP_DIR, then run: uv sync && uv run python scripts/install.py. The 'patched' branch tracks kleer001/main with ysysimon PR #2 (Windows path/encoding fixes) and ysk424 PR #3 (parm.label/Color/vex crash fixes) merged.

post_install.name: houdini-plugin
post_install.description: Install the Houdini-side plugin (auto-loads MCP server when Houdini opens; bridge auto-launches headless hython if Houdini GUI is not running)
post_install.command: cd '{{HOUDINI_MCP_DIR}}' && uv sync && uv run python scripts/install.py

post_install.name: mcporter
post_install.description: MCPorter CLI for calling MCP tools from the command line

integration_test.description: Verifies the MCP bridge can reach Houdini (auto-launches headless hython if no GUI is running)

HOUDINI_MCP_DIR.prompt: Path to your local clone of kleer001/houdini-mcp (the folder containing houdini_mcp_server.py). On Windows: e.g. C:/Users/<you>/dev/houdini-mcp. On macOS/Linux: e.g. ~/dev/houdini-mcp

post_install_hints: Restart Houdini for the plugin to take effect (or rely on the auto-launched headless hython).

PORT: the bridge is pinned to HOUDINIMCP_PORT=9877 (via mcp_servers.env) to avoid colliding with BlenderMCP, which also defaults to 9876. For the Houdini GUI plugin to bind 9877, add this line to your houdini.env (Windows: ~/Documents/houdini<ver>/houdini.env; macOS: ~/Library/Preferences/houdini/<ver>/houdini.env; Linux: ~/houdini<ver>/houdini.env), then restart Houdini:  HOUDINIMCP_PORT = 9877

Bridge sourced from arghhhhh/houdini-mcp branch 'patched' — kleer001/main + ysysimon PR #2 (Windows fixes) + ysk424 PR #3 (parm/vex crash fixes). To pull upstream updates: cd into the clone, git remote add upstream https://github.com/kleer001/houdini-mcp.git && git fetch upstream && git rebase upstream/main.
